raw_consumer_statement:
I submitted a dispute to Citi ( XXXX XXXX Card ) on XXXX pertaining to the XXXX XXXX XXXX {$150.00} charge. Citi closed the dispute on XXXX in favor for XXXX XXXX. I requested reopening Case # XXXX on XXXX submitting further documented evidence that the XXXX Customer Service Representative I dealt with at XXXX XXXX XXXX  agreed to cancel this charge. 

I explained my mistake to the XXXX XXXX Customer Service Representative when trying to return to XXXX on XXXX prompting further negotiations between us and another party via phone. After explaining the two additional charges for the return ticket, I requested a courtesy cancellation of the {$150.00} charge due to my honest oversight. Dispute Rebuttal Attachment 1 shows the representative successfully cancelling the second charge. Dispute Rebuttal Attachment 2 shows the receipt and return ticket given to me on XXXX. 

Regards, XXXX Attachments ( 2 )
